positive: A highly detailed, stylized graphic depiction of a nocturnal forest panorama. Giant, stylized trees with clean, geometric silhouettes dominate the foreground. The scene transitions into a swirling cosmic nebula sky filled with glowing constellations, crescent moons, and ethereal galaxies. Strong contrast between the deep indigo/midnight blue tones of the forest and the luminous gold/cyan palette of the sky. Minimalist, vector art style, woodcut etching influence, centered composition, perfect for screen printing on apparel, symmetrical, high saturation.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, watermark, signature, text, low detail, messy background, bokeh, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, realistic photography
